sharedPost.text:
Mała przyjemność- duże emocje! Słodki casting do reklamy słodyczy!

! RODZINNA REKLAMA ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA !

Do pysznej kampanii wyrobów czekoladowych poszukujemy:

Mile widziane prawdziwe rodzinki!

Role pierwszoplanowe:

Dziewczynka – (ok. 5-8l) – Szukamy energicznej, pozytywnej dziewczynki w wieku około 6 lat, która naturalnie wchodzi w kontakt i reaguje na dorosłych aktorów. Musi lubić czekoladę 😉

Tata (ok. 30-35 lat) – Ciepły i naturalny, z poczuciem humoru i swobodny w kontakcie z dziećmi. Ważniejsza od „idealności” jest wiarygodność i sympatyczna, dostępna energia.

Rola drugoplanowa:

Mama (ok. 30-35 lat) – Ciepła, naturalna, poruszająca. Może być mama z prawdziwą córką.

CHĘTNIE OSOBY RÓŹNORODNE ETNICZNIE !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Wizytówka po polsku + scenka

STAWKI:

Dorośli: od 5 000 zł !

Dzieci: od 1 000 zł !

TIMING:

22.05 – piątek- termin wysyłania materiałów do godziny 19.00

03.06 – dzień zdjęciowy w Warszawie

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Temat: 051

Link do castingu + opis scenki do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting051/

Twórz słodkie wspomnienia już teraz- czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
!!! GLINIARZE !!! WARSZAWA !!! POSZUKIWANY BLONDYN !!!

Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję BLONDYNA do roli:

Hubert Jaskólski (18) – Kolega podejrzanego o gwałt. Wie, że niesłusznie posądził kolegę i to przez niego tamten został brutalnie pobity, ale teraz nie chce się przyznać na policji. KONIECZNIE BLONDYN

Data: 28. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text: 🌴🎶 Słyszeliście już te letnie dźwięki? Oficjalnie OTWIERAMY zgłoszenia! 🎶🌴

sharedPost.text:
🌴🎶 Słyszeliście już te letnie dźwięki? Oficjalnie OTWIERAMY zgłoszenia! 🎶🌴

Jeśli przegapiliście nasz wideo-klip, spieszymy z przypomnieniem, Ogólnopolski Konkurs Piosenki On-Line „Wakacyjne Melodie 2026” właśnie wystartował! Spakujcie dawkę dobrego humoru, rozgrzejcie struny głosowe i dołączcie do najbardziej muzycznego wydarzenia tego lata. ✨

Nie ma znaczenia, czy śpiewasz od niedawna, czy scena to Twój drugi dom, czy masz 8 lat, czy znacznie więcej. Szukamy pasji, pozytywnej energii i letniego klimatu! 🌊🎙️

🔥 NOWOŚĆ, KTÓRA ROZGRZEJE EMOCJE: GŁOSOWANIE PUBLICZNOŚCI! 🔥
W tej edycji to NIE TYLKO jury decyduje o wygranej! Wprowadzamy Głosowanie Publiczności, co oznacza, że Twoi znajomi, rodzina, fani oraz wszyscy miłośnicy muzyki będą mogli oddawać głosy na Twoje wykonanie bezpośrednio na naszej stronie! Udostępniaj swoje zgłoszenie, zbieraj głosy i walcz o nagrodę publiczności! 🗳️❤️

📬 Jak wysłać zgłoszenie?
To banalnie proste! Nagraj swoją ulubioną piosenkę (w ogrodzie, na plaży, a może w domowym studiu?) i prześlij ją do nas przez formularz online.

🎯 Wszystkie najważniejsze adresy znajdziesz tutaj:

📝 Zgłoś się do konkursu: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/zgloszenie

🗳️ Głosowanie Publiczności: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/glosowanie

📜 Regulamin konkursu: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/regulamin

❓ Masz pytania? Zajrzyj do sekcji FAQ: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/faq

Rozpocznij z nami wakacje w wielkim stylu. Czekamy na Twój głos! ☀️🎤

**FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL **

Hi everyone! I’m back with the final phase of casting for our feature film. Thank you for your incredible response to our project! Our lead casting is currently under consideration with our directors. We are now ready to round out the team and cast our supporting characters. Please see the roles below, and do not hesitate to submit for multiple roles. I hope to see you on set, it’s going to be a blast. Cheers to film in Colorado! 

**Here’s how to audition: **[https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28](https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28)

**DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE**

**Feature Film**

Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Writers: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain, Jill Coats, Crowded Table Pictures

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Project Shoot Dates: 7/1-7/14 & 8/14-8/21

Location: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO 

Logline: *After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.  *

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives. 

**ROLES:**

**SUPPORTING**
*Rate $400/Day*

**COSMO** Late 60’s - Male - Ex-hippie - 3 Days

**JED & RAT** 35-75 - Males - Goons - 4 Days

**___**
**DAYPLAYER**

*Rate $350/Day* 

**DR. WILBUR** 50’s Male - Mustache, Turtleneck, Large Glasses - Founder of “Ellipses” - 1 Day

**ELLIPSES PATIENT (1, 2, 3)** 50-85 - Any Gender - 1 Day

**SLOANE** Early to Mid 30’s - Female - Waitress - 1 Day

**DR. STEPHEN RISSMILLER** 36 - Male - Professor - 1 Day

**BILL** 52 - Male - Academic Faculty - 1 Day

**KAYLA** 25 - Female - Graduate Student - 1 Day

**CASEY** 27 - Male - Graduate Student - 1 Day
___
**DAYPLAYER - NON-SPEAKING **
*Rate $200/Day*

**PICKLE BALL WIFE** 65-75 - Female - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**PICKLE BALL HUSBAND** 65-75 - Male - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**RECEPTIONIST** Any Age - Any Gender - Receptionist at “Ellipses” - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

___
**DAYPLAYER - VOICEOVER **
*Rate $150/Day*

**ABIGAIL** 30’s - Female - Ezra’s Ex-Wife - Voiceover Only - 1 Day

___

**BACKGROUND**

*Rate $75/Day*

**GRADUATE STUDENTS** 23-30 - Any Gender - English Majors - 1 Day

**DINER PATRONS** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**CEREMONY CROWD** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**Thank you again for your excitement and support! Please connect with us on our socials ****below**** for updates, further cast/crew calls, and to see when we’re filming in your neighborhood. Keep in touch!   - The Durango Team :)**

https://www.instagram.com/crowdedtablepictures?igsh=eHQ3OHg5cXpteDd2

items.text:
Joust - Folk Feature Casting Call
Title: Joust

Genre: (Comedy, Drama, Coming of Age)

Logline: Following a self-inflicted break up, a young man spends the summer reflecting on his actions that have had ripple effects beyond his understanding.

Roles:

TESSA - Female, 16-18 - A mostly confident, but aimless and introverted writer. The film is split into three distinct acts, and Tessa is the lead of the third act and co-lead of the second act. Lives a very quiet life, one that is presented as a somewhat aspirational lifestyle to the audience.

BEN - Male, 16-18 - A renaissance faire employee with a somewhat disgruntled but nerdy demeanor. Charming when in the presence of those he is most comfortable with, Ben's entire deal in this movie is that he is in a totally normal relationship and throws it away because his girlfriend seemed disinterested in him in a dream. Co-lead of the first and second acts.

GRACE - 16-18 - A career-driven and charming first year university student, studying experience design. Perceived by Ben as being a distant partner, she's really just going through a stressful period of time. Often switches between appearing as a free spirit in friendships/relationships, but somewhat corporate in professional/academic contexts. Co-lead of the first act.

Production Company: Beacon Releasing (Fully Indie/Folk, Self Produced by Joel Davis Warren)

Production Type: Indie, Folk, Micro-Budget

Contact Information: Inquire at my personal cell via text (719)-246-6149 or email cosummerfilm@gmail.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Unpaid (Free food, reel deliverables, and IMDB/TMDB credits, though!)

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Contact me with either a reel, headshots, resume, or social media profile. One self tape may be requested. No specific due date, so I'll take this post down by the time I'm unable to take any more submissions.

Shooting Schedule: Intermittent shooting over the month of July, will schedule around our lead talent's schedules.

Filming Location: Colorado Springs

Additional Information: This is a folk feature film, meaning it is being entirely made as a hobby project with a very limited cast and crew, made on a VERY low budget. Anyone who can give a natural performance with an emphasis on improv, would be wonderful, regardless of experience level. Actors and non actors alike are welcome. The film will see a direct-to-YouTube release with a planned cast/crew premiere screening within the year. As stated, no financial compensation, so please keep that in mind!

Thanks so much for your time in reading this, and again, if you have any questions, please see the number or email above. :)

I’m a film director. On side I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio by the price that you choose yourself 🙌

For: actors, musicians, writers, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and snaps 

— 30 min session, outdoor or studio in Kreuzberg 

— 10–15 edited images delivered the next day 

— Full usage rights, yours to do whatever you want with 

— Portfolio rate: €50–120, choose the price that fits you

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your character

Five slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Heute Abend geht mein großes Videoprojekt zum Michael Jackson Film 2026 in die Premiere: https://lnkd.in/dxjKE739 

Michael Jackson Film 2026: Das große 46-Minuten-Dossier! 

Kein kurzer Trailer-Kommentar. Keine schnelle Reaktion. Sondern eine filmjournalistische Tiefenreise durch einen der spannendsten und zugleich heikelsten Musikfilme der kommenden Kinozeit. 

Kann ein Biopic über Michael Jackson überhaupt ehrlich erzählen, ohne zur Legendenpflege oder zur Abrechnung zu werden? 

Und weshalb könnte gerade die Entstehung dieses Films fast so spannend sein wie der Film selbst? 

Ich habe viele Details zusammengetragen, verdichtet und in ein 46-minütiges Gesamtwerk gebracht, das nicht nur Fans, sondern auch Filmfreunde, Popkultur-Beobachter und kritische Zuschauer abholen soll.

Heute Abend in der Premiere. 

Schau rein, denk mit, widersprich gerne und schreib mir danach Deine Sicht in die Kommentare. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#MichaelJacksonFilm2026 #MichaelMovie #MichaelJackson #Kino2026 #KarrideoReportage

items.text:
Casting Call: Postapokalyptischer Indie Spielfilm “Gamma” 

Dreh Zeitraum: 27.06.2026 – 05.07.2026 (Teilzeitraum je nach Rolle auch möglich)
Ort: Insel Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern

Gesuchte Positionen:

* ROBERT, m, etwa 25-35, akzentfreies Englisch notwendig
* SARAH, f, etwa 25-35, Englisch notwendig, aber kann deutschen Akzent haben
* EGON - m, 40-65, deutsch-sprachig

Status: Independent / Low-Budget (No-Paid mit prozentualer Beteiligung and eventuellen Erlösen - schriftlich festgehalten)

Über das Projekt
“Gamma” ist ein Independent Postapokalyptischer Film in Spielfilmlänge in englischer Originalsprache mit einigen Szenen auf Deutsch. Die Geschichte folgt Robert & Sarah, einem Expat Paar aus Berlin auf einem “Digital Detox Retreat“ nach Rügen - bei dem sie eine Woche lang ihre Handys und Laptops zuhause lassen müssen. Leider verpassen sie dabei auch katastrophales Weltgeschehen und wachen eines Tages beim Ende der Welt auf. 

Was wir bieten:
Da wir das Projekt ohne Budget auf private Kosten des Produzenten stemmen, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Wir teilen aber mit jedem Crew Mitglied eine bestimmte Prozentzahl eventueller Erlöse und halten dies auch vertraglich fest. Für Unterkunft und Catering ist gesorgt. Ausserdem für wunderbare Strände vor und nach den Dreharbeiten. 

Drehzeiten: Anständige Drehzeiten mit nicht mehr als 10 Stunden am Tag plus Pausen. Ihr habt jede Menge Zeit vor und nach Drehbeginn in der Ostsee eine Runde zu schwimmen.

Unterkunft: Wir übernehmen die kompletten Kosten für deine Übernachtung in einem lokalen typischen Rügener Landhaus unweit von der Ostsee.

Catering: Für erstklassige Verpflegung (Frühstück, Mittag, Abendessen, Snacks, Getränke) ist gesorgt.

Portfolio-Material: Wir arbeiten mit professionellem Equipment (RED, DZO Objektiven), um Material auf Top-Niveau für dein Showreel zu schaffen.

Credits: Offizielle Nennung im Abspann, auf der Webseite, auf Social Media und auf IMDb.

Wir suchen motivierte Crew-Mitglieder die Erfahrung auf einem vollen Spielfilm sammeln wollen und verlässlich und professionell sich für das Projekt engagieren. Wenn das auf Dich zutrifft, bewirb Dich !!!

Bewerbung bitte per E-Mail an:

Alexander von Schulz

[jastorf@protonmail.com](mailto:jastorf@protonmail.com)
items.summary:
Casting Call: Postapokalyptischer Indie Spielfilm “Gamma” 

Dreh Zeitraum: 27.06.2026 – 05.07.2026 (Teilzeitraum je nach Rolle auch möglich)
Ort: Insel Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern

Gesuchte Positionen:

* ROBERT, m, etwa 25-35, akzentfreies Englisch notwendig
* SARAH, f, etwa 25-35, Englisch notwendig, aber kann deutschen Akzent haben
* EGON - m, 40-65, deutsch-sprachig

Status: Independent / Low-Budget (No-Paid mit prozentualer Beteiligung and eventuellen Erlösen - schriftlich festgehalten)

Über das Projekt
“Gamma” ist ein Independent Postapokalyptischer Film in Spielfilmlänge in englischer Originalsprache mit einigen Szenen auf Deutsch. Die Geschichte folgt Robert & Sarah, einem Expat Paar aus Berlin auf einem “Digital Detox Retreat“ nach Rügen - bei dem sie eine Woche lang ihre Handys und Laptops zuhause lassen müssen. Leider verpassen sie dabei auch katastrophales Weltgeschehen und wachen eines Tages beim Ende der Welt auf. 

Was wir bieten:
Da wir das Projekt ohne Budget auf private Kosten des Produzenten stemmen, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Wir teilen aber mit jedem Crew Mitglied eine bestimmte Prozentzahl eventueller Erlöse und halten dies auch vertraglich fest. Für Unterkunft und Catering ist gesorgt. Ausserdem für wunderbare Strände vor und nach den Dreharbeiten. 

Drehzeiten: Anständige Drehzeiten mit nicht mehr als 10 Stunden am Tag plus Pausen. Ihr habt jede Menge Zeit vor und nach Drehbeginn in der Ostsee eine Runde zu schwimmen.

Unterkunft: Wir übernehmen die kompletten Kosten für deine Übernachtung in einem lokalen typischen Rügener Landhaus unweit von der Ostsee.

Catering: Für erstklassige Verpflegung (Frühstück, Mittag, Abendessen, Snacks, Getränke) ist gesorgt.

Portfolio-Material: Wir arbeiten mit professionellem Equipment (RED, DZO Objektiven), um Material auf Top-Niveau für dein Showreel zu schaffen.

Credits: Offizielle Nennung im Abspann, auf der Webseite, auf Social Media und auf IMDb.

Wir suchen motivierte Crew-Mitglieder die Erfahrung auf einem vollen Spielfilm sammeln wollen und verlässlich und professionell sich für das Projekt engagieren. Wenn das auf Dich zutrifft, bewirb Dich !!!

items.text:
🎥 TWO-MINUTE TUESDAY 🎥  
   🎬 Talent Drop Tuesday  🎬

You met the stars. Now meet the TALENT.  

Post a 2-minute-or-less clip:  
- Monologue you love  
- Song snippet  
- Self-tape you’re proud of  
- Hidden skill: accents, instruments, stunts, puppetry — word is casted too
- Even a BTS from class/rehearsal  
-a video do your talent
- No video? Drop your best action shot + tell us the story behind it.

It doesn’t have to be perfect. It has to be YOU.  

RULES: 
No apologies. No “this is bad but…” Energy only.  
Just post it in the comments and go for it. Casting directors scroll. Let’s give them something to stop for.

✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

sharedPost.text:
Hi guys,
I hope you’re well. I’m looking to start offering self tape coaching and filming services for young actors, mainly aged 5–18.
With self tapes now being such a huge part of the casting process, many auditions are done remotely, and I’ve noticed there’s a real need for young actors to have guidance and support throughout that process.
The way my service works is:
* Parents would contact me directly regarding an audition/self-tape request.
* I’d review the brief and script beforehand so I can understand the character and prepare how best to coach the actor.
* I’d also advise parents on suitable outfit choices based on the casting brief.
* During the session, I’d help the actor feel comfortable, guide them through the script, run practice takes, and offer coaching and direction throughout.
* I would then film the self-tape (acting as the reader where needed), edit the footage, and send the finished tape back ready for submission to their agent or casting director.
I have personal experience with auditioning and working on a film set, so I understand what casting teams are looking for in a strong self tape. While self-tapes don’t need a large professional studio setup, having the right guidance, lighting, framing, and environment can make a huge difference and really help the actor feel confident and prepared. 
If the actor has an in person audition and just wants someone to coach them through their audition script before their audition day I can offer this aswell! 
I am agency represented with experience in film and stage. 
If this is something you’d potentially be interested in discussing further, please send me a message and we can go through further details.
Thank you!
Samantha x

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“SEVEN TIMES, SEVENTH”***

**Director:** Hân Phạm

**Producers:** Shakil Jessa, Alger Ji-Liang

**Category:** Independent Short Film - Funded by BC Arts Council

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh, Hân Phạm

**Union Status:** UBCP/ACTRA ULB

**Compensation:** $150/day. Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-5, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, demo reel/resume (if you have) and tell us a little bit about yourself!

**LOGLINE:** After her death, Bay, a Vietnamese hairdresser, lingers as a spirit in her old salon. Over 49 Days, visits from her loved ones awaken memories of care, regret, and joy—revealing her quiet life as a matriarchal archive of survival and love.

****OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED****

**BAY - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, Late 40s-60s***

Bay is a middle-aged Vietnamese woman who arrived in Canada in the 80s as a boat woman. As the owner of a hair salon, she's hardworking, warm and caring, but is short-tempered and strict towards her staff and her family. Raising a child alone in unfamiliar land as a single mom, she hides the hardships and secrets of her past from her daughter, Dan. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HUONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Huong is a stay-at-home auntie and wife who frequents the beauty salon. She is casual and overly curious, loves gossip, and complains a lot about her husband, but is lighthearted at her core. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Hong is an experienced hairdresser and a friend of Bay. She is kind, understanding and open-minded. She likes to help others resolve conflicts. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

items.title: **SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (TWO LEAD ACTING ROLES)**

**Project Title:** Pill Popper

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

Hey everyone,

my name is Kai and I’m currently based in London.

I’ve been consistently training in acting and already have experience in front of the camera through modeling, as well as being involved in a few independent short film and creative projects.

Working on camera and being part of creative productions is something I genuinely enjoy, so I’m open to all kinds of opportunities — short films, music videos, student productions, commercials, fashion/editorial shoots and other creative projects. 🙌🏻

Languages: English & German  
Height: 178 cm  
Available for castings & self tapes

items.title: Hey everyone,

items.text:
***Casting Call - Toots***

We at Pineal Dreams Productions are deep into production on our fourth in-house film - Ouroboros - as well as working on a tangential project - Through The Doorway.

We have a pretty healthy track record of success, picking up 23 festival submissions and 15 awards through our first three works - Inside The Abyss (2022), Our Father (2024), And BARDO (2025)

We are delighted to announce we will be teaming up with T.A.F Productions and director Andy Cory for a short-film written by Joshua Moulinié (who will be acting as co-producer) - Toots.

We are casting for one actress - and this will be a dual role which we believe will give the chosen candidate a fantastic chance to develop experience, showcase their talent - as well as walk away with a fantastic showreel of footage featuring just themselves.

It also a PAID role (though quite minimal, as it is a self-funded indie project)

***Character Profile :  C/ Shadow C***

The story of Toots is a very simple one - as one person is forced to confront a manifestation of their own conscience and forced via a conversation to accept their mistakes, who they are, and come to terms with the consequences of their actions.

C is a mysterious character at first. She is deeply in denial about her own flaws, confrontational and quick to anger. As the conversation progresses, we learn more about her dual-nature and the inner conflict she has between accepting who she is and taking responsibility for her own decisions/choices - and passing the blame to the trauma that she has gone through. Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié

items.text:
Individual audition slots are filled!
DM or email 
DarkTheatreDale@proton.me 
For your information and submission pack 

🎥 Video submissions close 26 May 2026

Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill's 
The incendiary play presented by Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. 

This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 

He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.

The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 

This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
 

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

items.text:
Daqui a pouco o último
LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

14 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/.../176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m.../

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
**Casting Call Alert!**

We’re looking for Berlin based actors for *The Runner* a 15 minute student short film-a dramedy / coming of age / love story set in modern-day Berlin.

 **Production Name:** The runner
 **Location:** Berlin
 **Duration:** 5 shooting days (+1 rehearsal day)
 **Deadline for Application:** 25th May
 **Payment:** Negotiable (low-budget student production)
 **Shooting Dates:** July 21-27 
 Produced as part of the Master’s program at MetFilm School Berlin

If you're interested, please send your headshot, CV, and/or demo reel to:
 **abril.arap.film@gmail.com**

BYDGOSZCZ / okolice

PILNIE szukamy mężczyzny do roli OCHRONIARZA (security) do nowego serialu „In Cold Eyes”.

Zdjęcia: 18 maja
Stawka: 400 zł brutto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Szukamy wysokiego, dobrze zbudowanego, charakterystycznego mężczyzny o typowej prezencji ochroniarza.
Wzrost orientacyjnie od 180 cm.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób z Bydgoszczy lub okolic, które mogą samodzielnie dojechać na plan zdjęciowy.

Wszystkie zainteresowane osoby proszę o wiadomość prywatną wraz ze zdjęciem i wzrostem 🙂

[ZLECENIE PŁATNE] 

CASTING!

Poszukujemy osób do krótkich, dynamicznych nagrań rolek na social media dla klienta z branży budowlanej.

Szukamy:
-  mężczyzny 60+  
-  kobiety 35–45  

Nagrania odbędą się 26.05 we Wrocławiu i potrwają kilka godzin.  
Stawka: 500–1000 zł, w zależności od liczby godzin na planie (ustalamy)

Doświadczenie nie jest wymagane, ale poczucie humoru mile widziane — trzeba się trochę powygłupiać.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:  
halo@truflestudio.pl

z dopiskiem: BETON

items.text:
🎶🎞️ CASTING 🎞️🎶
Poszukujemy 2 osób, które były na koncercie Dawida Podsiadło i  mają wspólną ciekawą historię związaną z tym koncertem 🙂 
Szukamy osób z Katowic i bliskich okolic, ale rozważymy też inne miasta. 

Na podstawie prawdziwej historii uczestników będziemy kręcić filmik promocyjny dla jednej z marek, która patronuje nowej trasie Dawida. 

🎶 Nagrania odbędą się w Katowicach w dniach 5 i 6 czerwca. Za udział w nagraniach osoby otrzymają wynagrodzenie + wejście na koncert. 

📧 Zainteresowane osoby proszę o przesłanie zgłoszenia do mnie na maila: MONIKALUKASIEWICZCASTING@GMAIL.COM z tytułem ,,Koncert ”.  

Co zawrzeć w zgłoszeniu: 

- przedstawcie się: kim i skąd jesteście co Was łączy;  króciutko opowiedzcie jaką macie wspólną historię związana z koncertem Dawida 🙂 proszę też załączyć jedno Wasze aktualne zdjęcie - jeśli nagrywacie się na video to nie trzeba wysyłać zdjęcia. 

- albo napisz to w treści maila albo prześlijcie to w formie video i podeślij jako link do YouTube 

‼️ W odpowiedzi prześlemy wszystkie szczegóły. 

‼️ Zgłoszenia proszę przesyłać do 18 maja.

items.text:
Castingly - Spotlight
Hi Everyone! 

Daniel from Castingly here, I’m putting together a series of spotlight features for our social channels and would love to showcase you!

If you want to be considered: 

Send me your Castingly public profile page — must be live to qualify. 

Email me the profile link at daniel@castingly.com with SUBJECT: Spotlight — I'll need your bio and a short filmed monologue you'd want showcased. 

If you don’t have a profile but would like to join, use this special offer: Get one year FREE with code ACTOR-2026. Sign up at [www.castingly.com](https://www.castingly.com/) — no payment required.

Update on Castingly: We just hit ~2,000 members and have nationwide casting breakdowns LIVE. Casting directors and production companies are already signing up.

Follow for tips & updates: Instagram @castinglyHQ and Facebook @CastinglyFeel free to reach out with any questions! Reply here or DM me — happy to help you set up your profile fast.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon, "deinem Lieblingssender"

MOVIETIME KW 21/2026

STAR WAR FEELING UND INTERVIEW MIT EINER SCHAUSPIELIKONE 

Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu startet am 20. Mai 2026 in den Kinos. Das lang erwartete Science-Fiction-Abenteuer bringt das beliebte Duo erstmals vom Streamingdienst Disney+ auf die große Kinoleinwand. Es markiert die lang ersehnte Rückkehr von Star Wars in die Lichtspielhäuser.

Die Legende des Wüstenkindes (Originaltitel: L'Enfant Du Désert) ist ein französisches Kino-Abenteuer und Familiendrama von Regisseur Gilles de Maistre. Nun startet der Film und basiert auf historischen Nomaden-Überlieferungen aus Nordafrika.

Im letzten Sommer beendete er seine Schauspielkarriere, wir konnten mit der Ikone des deutschsprachigen Film, Sky Dumont, ein Interview über seine Laufbahn führen und Prof Mag Adolf Obendrauf erzählt uns was die Militärmusik NÖ mit dem Film verbindet.

Ergänzt wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 20.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredits: SMF, Disney Pictures

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

items.text:
Auditions for Around the World in 80 Days at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente
AUDITIONS!

Around the World in 80 Days
Adapted by Mark Brown. From the novel by Jules Verne.
Directed by Frank Minano

Auditions:
Sunday, May 24 @ 6:00pm

Callbacks: by invitation Tuesday, June 2 @ 7:00pm

Synopsis:
Join fearless adventurer Phileas Fogg and his faithful manservant as they race to beat the clock! Phileas Fogg has agreed to an outrageous wager that puts his fortune and his life at risk. With his resourceful servant Passepartout, Fogg sets out to circle the globe in an unheard-of 80 days. But his every step is dogged by a detective who thinks he’s a robber on the run. Danger, romance, and comic surprises abound in this whirlwind of a show as 6 actors portraying 39 characters traverse seven continents in one of the great adventures of all time.

Please be prepared to read from sides provided
Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.
Cold reading sides will also be provided at auditions.
Performances: August 21 to September 13, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm
Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees August 29 and September 12 at 2:00pm
Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse

@7pm
June 9,16, 23, 30
July 7, 9, 21, 22, 28, 29
Aug 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 13
Tech 16-20

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
There is a $100 stipend offered

The play blends Victorian adventure with Monty Python–style farce. Characters are richly drawn but heightened for theatricality—committed, playful, and self-aware. Timing, transformation, and ensemble cohesion are key

All audition information can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

items.text:
THE ULTIMATE SUMMER SCHOOL…

📍 ArtsEd London
📅 10–17 August

A jam-packed week of industry masterclasses with:

Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Diante Lodge, Ben Harris, Hannah Dimtsu, Hannah Taylor, Jacosta Almgil and Ollie Crouch

Plus, opportunities to be scouted for professional work.

✨ Ages 8+
✨ Payment options available

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (MMU STUDENT PROJECT)

We are casting for a short film titled Through Memories (Ninaivin Vazhiye), centered around themes of grief and healing.

Role: Chithi (Aunt)

- Female, late 30s–45s
- Caring, grounded, and emotionally composed
- A supportive presence in the family while dealing with her own grief

Synopsis:
After her grandmother’s passing, a teenage girl struggles with the absence left behind as life slowly returns to normal. Through everyday moments, the film explores how grief lingers and becomes something we learn to live with.

Details:
📍 Location: Klang (Exact location to be announced)
📅 Shoot Dates: June 12–14, 2026 (tentative, mid-June)
🗣 Language: English + Tamil
🎥 Duration: ~10 minutes
💰 Talent Fee: RM125 (including transport allowance)

Audition Requirement:

- Submit a short audio audition (script will be provided)

If interested, please DM or send your audition to:
📩 012-588 1600 (Dev – Producer & Writer)

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a callback.

items.text:
!!! GLINIARZE !!! WARSZAWA !!! POSZUKIWANY BLONDYN !!!

Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję BLONDYNA do roli:

Hubert Jaskólski (18) – Kolega podejrzanego o gwałt. Wie, że niesłusznie posądził kolegę i to przez niego tamten został brutalnie pobity, ale teraz nie chce się przyznać na policji. KONIECZNIE BLONDYN

Data: 28. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

📢 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: KIBICE W PUBIE! 🍻⚽

​Agencja Kamed Studio poszukuje osób do roli statystów z wizerunkiem jako kibice w pubie! Jeśli masz w sobie sportowe emocje i chcesz zobaczyć, jak wygląda praca na planie, to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie!

​🎯 Kogo szukamy?

​Wiek: 18–70 lat

​Lokalizacja: Osoby z Trójmiasta i okolic

​📅 Szczegóły nagrań:

​Miejsce zdjęć: Gdynia

​Termin: 26 maja (26.05)

​Wynagrodzenie: 250 zł netto (płatne przelewem)

​📩 Jak się zgłosić?

​Wyślij swoje zgłoszenie mailowo na adres:

📧 marlena.kamedstudio@gmail.com

​W treści maila podaj:

​Aktualne zdjęcia (twarzy i sylwetki)

​Numer telefonu do kontaktu

​Miejscowość, w której mieszkasz

​⚠️ WAŻNE: W tytule wiadomości koniecznie wpisz dopisek: „KIBICE GDYNIA”

items.text:
Urgent Casting London
Short Film: Suzi

A paid short film looking for a Turkish actress to cover a drop off.

* Female

* Playing age: **45–55**

* **Turkish / Kurdish**

* Must speak **Turkish fluently**

* Warm, emotionally complex, naturalistic performer

* Strong subtle acting and emotional subtext preferred

 SHOOT DETAILS

* **Location:** London

* **Shoot Dates:** 22–23 May

* **Rate:** £200/day

* **Rehearsal:** Required prior to shoot

* **Urgent fast-turnaround casting** due to actor drop-off

A quiet, intimate drama focused on identity, memory, family, and belonging.

### TO APPLY

Please send:

* Headshot / recent photos

* CV or Spotlight link (if available)

Email: **[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)**

**Please confirm in your application that:**

* You speak Turkish

* You are available on 22–23 May

* You are London-based or able to travel to London

You can also add:

> Subject Line: “SUZI – [Your Name]”

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of ‎text that says '‎Suzi Aged Aged45-55 45 - 45-55 55 Turkish/Kurdish Turkish Kurdish م (SUZ (SUZAN) SUZI ROLE UZAN BREAKDOWN KEMAL' KEMAL'SAUNTY. WARM BUT COMPLEX-HE COMPLEX-HERSTORIES HER STORIES MOVE BETWEEN HUMOURAND AND PAIN. EMOTION SITS CLOSE TO THE SURFACE, OFTEN SPILLING OUT UNEXPECTEDLY. LOOKING FORANATURAL, FORA INSTINCTIVEPERFORMER. INSTINCTIVE PERFORMER. Mora‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'TITLE: ITLE:MIRAS LOGLINE: In his father's funeral, Kemal, young 2nd generation immigrant, begins the painful process of uncoveringhi his family's tu turbulent past when a S dialogue with his aunty forces him to confront the legacy they left behind. A quiet, intimate story about identity and belonging within the Alevi diaspora. Location: London Dates: 2 days Late May Paid Think restrained performances, emotional subtext, and naturalism. I'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (Vancouver) — WICKEDWOLF MEDIA**

Short comedic project filming in the next 2–3 weeks. Shoot will last approximately 2.5 hours. Compensation: $150 flat per role. Non-union.

Seeking 5–6 high-energy, native English-speaking performers (M/F), ages 18–45. Local applicants only. Shoot date will be finalized after cast selection based on availability; ideally an afternoon shoot.

Role: Performers will portray a group of friends playing an indie adult party game — loud, varied, and highly expressive laughter, plus improvised comments and reactions. This is fast, funny, and irreverent.

To apply: Please message here OR email a recent photo and brief bio or resume link to michael@wickedwolf.media. Please include your city and phone number.

Submission deadline: May 22, 5pm.

topComments.text: Michael, could you provide a shoot location and date?
Do I need to be a Caucasian to apply?

BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS
Hi!

We are looking for background for our upcoming short film filming May 20th - 22nd, 2026.

We are looking for a DIVERSE RANGE of actors, of all ages 18+, nationalities, and gender identities, to play a wide range of BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS.

Please note this is an unpaid opportunity but you will be provided lots of very delicious food and lunch on set!!

We are filming in Port Coquitlam.

Please let us know which days you are available, you can choose to do only one of the days, two, or all three days!

If interested, please email or DM me or fill out the following form —[ https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6](https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING DO ETIUDY OPERATORSKIEJ – SZKOŁA FILMOWA W ŁODZI 🎬
Szukamy aktorki do głównej roli w mrocznej etiudzie operatorskiej realizowanej w ramach produkcji studenckiej Państwowa Wyższa Szkoła Filmowa, Telewizyjna i Teatralna im. Leona Schillera w Łodzi.

📍 Zdjęcia realizowane będą w klimatycznych lokacjach:
 – YMCA w Łodzi
 – grota w parku Helenówek

📅 Terminy zdjęć nocnych:
 9/10 czerwca
 10/11 czerwca
 11/12 czerwca

Kogo szukamy?
 ✨ Aktorki w wieku 18–25 lat
 ✨ Długie blond lub rude włosy
 ✨ Otwartość na mroczny, artystyczny klimat projektu

Film ma duży potencjał festiwalowy i będzie mocno nastawiony na atmosferę oraz wizualną stronę opowieści. To świetna okazja do zdobycia wartościowego doświadczenia na planie i współpracy z ekipą filmową ze szkoły filmowej w Łodzi.

❗Niestety projekt jest niskobudżetowy, dlatego nie możemy zaoferować wynagrodzenia. Możemy jednak zapewnić nocleg oraz pełne zaopiekowanie na planie.

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o kontakt mailowy:

Temat maila: Casting, etiuda operatorska

Treść maila: zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki, wzrost, wiek, nr. telefonu

p.malasiewicz@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
SEEKING HMUA PAID
Looking for a HMUA to assist on a Non-Union feature film on Monday, May 18th and Tuesday may 19th. Looking for someone who can help with light glam on female talent and touch ups on background actors! This is a Paid position! 

Location: Pittsburg, PA 

Dates: May 18th-19th 

Rate: $250/12hrs

To apply, email me: sarah.turnermua@gmail.com

Even if you’re not Available for both days, please email me specifying which day you are available if interested! You will also likely not be needed the entire 12 hours but will still be paid the full amount regardless. KIT NOT PROVIDED, BRING YOUR OWN SUPPLIES! Food/crafty will be provided on set and you will receive on screen credit!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — As The Light Fades  
   
We are currently looking for a young Black male actor, high school age, for an upcoming role in our psychological crime thriller, As The Light Fades.  
   
Details:  
• High school age appearance  
• Black male actor  
• Height max: 5’9”  
• Filming in Colorado Springs  
• Shooting begins in June  
• Deferred pay  
• IMDb credit provided  
   
This is a grounded, emotionally driven project with a strong focus on performance and character work.  
   
To apply, please private message A.j. Bennett with:  
• Headshot or recent photos  
• Age  
• Height  
• Acting experience (if applicable)  
• Phone number and email  
   
#AsTheLightFades #CastingCall #ColoradoActors #IndieFilm #FilmCasting

media.ocrText: May be an image of fire and text that says 'NE NE AS THE LIGHT FADES ASTHELIGHTFADES I COMINGSOON'

pageName.name: As The Light Fades Feature Film

user.name: As The Light Fades Feature Film

sharedPost.text:
📸 PHOTO SUBMISSION CALL — As The Light Fades  
   
We are currently looking for school photos, family photos, and candid childhood photos of girls ages 10 and younger to be used as part of fictional investigative materials within the film.  
   
These images may appear in:  
• Missing persons flyers  
• Detective case files  
• Investigation boards  
• Background investigative elements  
   
Details:  
• Parent/guardian permission required  
• Photo release required for use in the film  
• IMDb special thanks credit available  
• Volunteer contribution  
   
To submit, please private message A.j. Bennett with:  
• Child’s first name and age  
• Submitted photos  
• Parent/guardian contact information  
   
Thank you for helping us bring the world of As The Light Fades to life.  
   
#AsTheLightFades #IndieFilm #FilmProduction #ColoradoFilm #PsychologicalThriller

items.text:
Für einen Werbedreh werden 6 Statisten gesucht, gedreht wird am 26.05. in Stuttgart. Es wird ein Live-Event sein mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft 2026. 

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.
Gedreht wird von 11 - 22 Uhr. 

Bei interesse bitte auch direkt ein Foto mit schicken. 

Das ganze wird natürlich bezahlt! 

Liebe Grüße und bis bald

items.summary:
Für einen Werbedreh werden 6 Statisten gesucht, gedreht wird am 26.05. in Stuttgart. Es wird ein Live-Event sein mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft 2026. 

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.
Gedreht wird von 11 - 22 Uhr. 

Bei interesse bitte auch direkt ein Foto mit schicken. 

Das ganze wird natürlich bezahlt! 

Liebe Grüße und bis bald

items.text: Deadline für die Bewerbung ist 21.05.!

items.text:
Directors constantly say things like…

“Wouldn’t it be cool if they did this…”

Actors need to think the SAME way when producing self-tapes. 🎬

Not:
“How do I get this perfect?”

But:
“How do I make this interesting?”

Use the space.
Create behaviour.
Make choices.
Bring ideas.

The actors getting callbacks usually aren’t the safest…
They’re the most watchable. 🔥

linktr.ee/mattzina

#SelfTape #ActorsLife #ScreenActing #ActingCoach #FilmActing

items.text:
Hello all my name is Beckie I am an Actor based in West Midlands.

I’m currently looking into getting some new headshots and would love to connect with people who are interested in building and expanding their portfolios. 

I’m open to collaborating on creative shoots, trying out new ideas, and helping others gain more content and experience while creating something great together.

Feel free to reach out to me as I would love to hear from you.

📸 📸📸📸📸📸📸📸📸📸📸

Want to get involved? First Thursday class is FREE! Come and give it a try. 🙌

This was after just one class. 😊 Awesome to have some new faces along to join us in Thursday Beginners. (7-8pm)

Varied routines, regularly
Warm-up / Aerobic workout
Toning / Strengthening section
Technical work

Monday classes too. (6.30-7.30pm)

Please DM for further details and to book your slot.

items.text:
✨ WE ARE GROWING ✨
Majestic Academy of Performing Arts is looking for NEW teachers to join our team and help us open our waiting lists! 💜💛
We are currently looking for:
⭐ Dance Teachers
⭐ Singing and/or Piano Teachers
We are looking for passionate, inspiring and dedicated teachers who love working with children and helping young performers grow in confidence and creativity.
✅ All teachers must hold an enhanced DBS
✅ Further information required upon application
If you would love to be part of our growing academy, we would love to hear from you!
📩 Please drop us a message or email:
info@majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk
🌐 Websites:
Majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk
Majestictalent.co.uk
#PerformingArts #Chester #TeachingJobs #MajesticAcademy #ActingSchool

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬
Project: The Green Frog  

Director: Khushik Mangal  

Production Company: Chronic Pictures  

Location: London / Surrey  

Shoot Dates: End of June – July 2026  

We are casting for a key role in our upcoming feature film:

Character: Lando LeDoux  

Gender: Male  

Age Range: 21–28  

Requirements:  

– Must have long hair  

– Must have a beard  

– Strong screen presence and naturalistic acting style preferred  

This is a great opportunity to be part of a bold, character-driven indie feature.

📩 To apply, please send:  

– Headshot  

– Showreel (if available)  

– Current photos (clearly showing hair length)  

– Contact details  

Email: chronicpictures22@gmail.com  

Website: chronicpictures.co.uk  

Tag someone perfect for this role 👇

#CastingCall #Actors #LondonActors #SurreyActors #IndieFilm #ActingOpportunity

📣👬 Casting Call! 👬📣

Young Male Twins aged 16-19 Needed for Major New Film!

Filming 10th & 11th June - London & Guildford, Surrey.

Great rates of pay (FAA/PACT): Roughly £140-£250+ per day (depending on hours worked).

Already on our books? Be sure to update your profile using the guides in the link below to boost your chances!

Please visit https://extra-people.com/male-twins for more information!

items.text:
# **NON-UNION CASTING CALL**

This commercial is for Ford and films in Calgary** all expenses paid.**

You must be available **June 15-22** for ALL DATES. If not available to travel to Calgary for these dates do no submit.

Auditions will be via self tape you do at home. Callbacks will be done via zoom. Must not be exclusively repped by a commercial agent to apply.

**Pay: **

$300 per travel day (2)

$300 per down day (day not working)

$600 per day on set 

$6000 buyout after commercial is edited and airing

Flights, 4-5* hotel and expenses covered.

IF local to calgary no hotel provided. 

**We are seeking:**

**Men:**
* Real Carpenters (30s-40s)
* Real farmers (30s-40s)
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)
* Real Industrial Builders (30s-50s)
* Real Older Farmer (60s-70s)
* Real Younger Farmer (young 20s)

**Women:**
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)

**If you are available and fit the specs abov**e please send to [lynda@gotalentagency.com](mailto:lynda@gotalentagency.com) ASAP:

1. First/Last name
2. Email
3. Phone
4. ONE good photo (head/shoulders) taken recently
5. Which category you fall into and a brief description of your experience

[www.gotalentagency.com](www.gotalentagency.com)

3. Phone
4. ONE good photo (head/shoulders) taken recently
5. Which category you fall into and a brief description of your experience

Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektaklu
Do spektaklu niezależnej grupy teatralnej na podstawie autorskiego scenariusza szukam aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych) do ról:
* Kapelan (pierwowzór ksiądz Josef Tiso)
* Wolf (oficer niemiecki)
* Jakub ( młody Żyd, członek ŻOBU)

Przewidziana premiera spektaklu: październik 26. Projekt niekomercyjny aczkolwiek nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może ta historia zaprowadzić. Terminy prób do dogadania. Zapraszam na priv. Pozdrawiam.

sharedPost.text:
Mała przyjemność- duże emocje! Słodki casting do reklamy słodyczy!

! RODZINNA REKLAMA ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA !

Do pysznej kampanii wyrobów czekoladowych poszukujemy:

Mile widziane prawdziwe rodzinki!

Role pierwszoplanowe:

Dziewczynka – (ok. 5-8l) – Szukamy energicznej, pozytywnej dziewczynki w wieku około 6 lat, która naturalnie wchodzi w kontakt i reaguje na dorosłych aktorów. Musi lubić czekoladę 😉

Tata (ok. 30-35 lat) – Ciepły i naturalny, z poczuciem humoru i swobodny w kontakcie z dziećmi. Ważniejsza od „idealności” jest wiarygodność i sympatyczna, dostępna energia.

Rola drugoplanowa:

Mama (ok. 30-35 lat) – Ciepła, naturalna, poruszająca. Może być mama z prawdziwą córką.

CHĘTNIE OSOBY RÓŹNORODNE ETNICZNIE !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Wizytówka po polsku + scenka

STAWKI:

Dorośli: od 5 000 zł !

Dzieci: od 1 000 zł !

TIMING:

22.05 – piątek- termin wysyłania materiałów do godziny 19.00

03.06 – dzień zdjęciowy w Warszawie

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Temat: 051

Link do castingu + opis scenki do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting051/

Twórz słodkie wspomnienia już teraz- czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
📸 Suche Fotografen & Videografen! Offen für alle Arten von Shootings 🎥
Hi! Ich bin auf der Suche nach Kooperationen und offen für absolut jedes Format: Foto, Video, kreative Projekte oder kommerzielle Werbedrehs.

Kurz vorab: Ich bin kein Runway-Model mit Modelmaßen. Ich bin eine ganz normale Frau mit einem natürlichen Look, aber super motiviert, mich in verschiedensten Stilen auszuprobieren и neue Looks umzusetzen.

Ich bin zeitlich extrem flexibel, fast immer verfügbar und spontan einsatzbereit. Wenn ihr ein Gesicht für euer Projekt sucht oder kurzfristig jemanden vor der Kamera braucht — schreibt mir einfach, ich bin für jeden Spaß zu haben!

📍 Location: Berlin (und Umgebung).

📩 Schreibt mir gerne eine private Nachricht, ich freue mich auf eure Ideen!

Hi everyone! I’ll be in Berlin from June 1 to June 5.

I’m looking for female models and dancers for TFP photo shoots during this time.

I mainly shoot female portraits and dance photography, in urban streets or in nature.

If you’re interested, feel free to DM me 😊
IG: @hughleo1994

Please include your photos or IG when messaging.

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We’re casting Denver locals for an ad campaign for the Denver Museum of Nature and Science.

We’re looking for various types of people:

- Real families of four (kids ages 7-12, parents 35-45)

items.text:
CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM

For an independent short film shooting near Stuttgart, we are looking for an elderly woman (75–90 years old) for a supporting role:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Woman · 75–90 years old
• Russian required
• German / English not important
• Face that tells a story

Character:
An elderly woman living in Germany the same way she used to live in the USSR. Strict but fair, and eager to help others by passing on traditions.

Logline:
A sleep-deprived daughter of Russian immigrants, struggling with lifelong sleep paralysis, discovers a new technique to escape her episodes.

Details:
• Preferably based near Stuttgart
• Unpaid / no-budget production
• Transportation & meals covered
• 1 shooting day around June 14th (exact date TBD)

Apply here:

[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

———  

CASTING CALL — KURZFILM 

Für einen unabhängigen Kurzfilm im Raum Stuttgart suchen wir eine ältere Frau (75–90 Jahre) für eine Nebenrolle:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Frau · 75–90 Jahre alt
• Russisch erforderlich
• Deutsch / Englisch nicht wichtig
• Gesicht, das eine Geschichte erzählt

Charakter:
Ältere Frau, die in Deutschland noch immer so lebt wie früher in der UdSSR. Streng, aber fair und bemüht, Menschen durch die Weitergabe ihrer Traditionen zu helfen.

Logline:
Eine schlaflose Tochter russischer Immigrant:innen, die ihr ganzes Leben unter Schlafparalysen leidet, entdeckt eine neue Methode, sich daraus zu befreien.

Infos:
• Idealerweise aus dem Raum Stuttgart
• Unbezahlt / No-Budget-Produktion
• Anreise & Verpflegung werden übernommen
• 1 Drehtag um den 14. Juni (genaues Datum folgt)

Bewerbung an:
[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING A LEAD ROLE ON A NETFLIX SHOW AT 18
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 and went from having no connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA, and booking a series regular on a Netflix show within three months.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see is the years of hard work and the clear strategy behind every move I made to move forward. 

Lately, I have been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS WHO ARE FEELING STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT

You train.

You get your materials together.

You are told “get an agent.”

But then…

You get an agent and nothing happens

Or you do not have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room

And if nothing changes, how will your career look two year from now?

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A 2 hour, 1 to 1 personalised career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:

• The one skill an actor must have to book work, and how to assess if you truly have it (hint: it’s not talent) 

• How to position yourself to attract the right representation

• What to focus on if you don’t have an agent, and how to actively work toward getting one

• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions 

• What to do if you’re auditioning a lot but not booking (the key most actors miss)

• The materials you actually need, and what most actors get wrong

• How to expand opportunities for yourself

• Plus much more

YOU LEAVE WITH AN EXACT PLAN TO BRIDGE THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE NOW AND WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO, PLUS THE EXACT STRATEGY I USED TO GO FROM UNKNOWN TO WORKING ACTOR.

If you’re ready to commit, comment COMMIT below or send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
Directors constantly say things like…

“Wouldn’t it be cool if they did this…”

Actors need to think the SAME way when producing self-tapes. 🎬

Not:
“How do I get this perfect?”

But:
“How do I make this interesting?”

Use the space.
Create behaviour.
Make choices.
Bring ideas.

The actors getting callbacks usually aren’t the safest…
They’re the most watchable. 🔥

linktr.ee/mattzina

#SelfTape #ActorsLife #ScreenActing #ActingCoach #FilmActing

items.text:
🎬 OPEN CASTING CALL – VERTICAL SHORT DRAMA SERIES
A new independent production house is now casting for an upcoming Vertical Short Drama Production created for platforms including YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, Vimeo, DramaBox, ReelShort, GoodShort, DramaWave & more.

This is an ongoing multi-episode micro-drama series with future opportunities for festival submissions and global digital distribution.

CASTING ROLES:

🔹 2 MALE TALENTS

Role Type: Hard Men / Security / Cartel-Mafia Crew

Age Range: 30s–40s

Ethnicity: Open

No acting experience required. Strong presence, confidence, and character appearance preferred. Previous acting or performance experience is a bonus.

🔹 3 FEMALE TALENTS

Role Type: Cartel Business Associates

Age Range: 20s–30s

Ethnicity: Open

Seeking confident, expressive personalities capable of portraying strong on-screen presence.

FILMING LOCATION:

📍 London, UK

PRODUCTION PERIOD:

Mid-Summer Production Schedule

July / August / September 2026

Please note:

This is an ongoing production with rotating casts across various episodes. Not all selected talents will be required for every shoot date. Casting selections will be made based on episode requirements and character suitability. Because it's a Independent project, this will only be Travel Reimbursement for the time being.

PROJECT DETAILS:

• Independent Self-Funded Start-Up Production

• Viral Social Media Focused Content

• Short Form Cinematic Drama Series

• Opportunities for future exposure through global micro-drama platforms & vertical film festivals

Selected applicants will receive:

• Character Backstory & Synopsis

• Production Information

• Online Zoom Casting Interview with Cast & Crew

• Opportunity to creatively contribute to character interpretation

PREFERRED:

Applicants already based in London, UK or surrounding areas.

TO APPLY:

Please E-MAIL the following:

• Recent Headshot / Portfolio Photos

• Full Name

• Age

• Contact Details

• Any Previous Experience (Optional)

IMPORTANT:

❌ NO DM’s

❌ NO INBOX MESSAGES

Applications or questions sent through social media direct messages will not be responded to.

Follow instructions carefully and apply via E-MAIL only to: Mikeybharj@gmail.com

Further details will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

items.text:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing).

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

items.title: **Casting Call – London **

items.text:
Doctor Who Fan Film Casting Call
We’re looking for four actors to fill roles for a Doctor Who Fan Film Christmas Special due to film in July/August this year.

The roles:

Eleanor - A Young woman in her mid 20s, she lives alone and has a complicated relationship with her family 

Edwin - A Victorian watchmaker in his mid 20s, and ancestor to Eleanor 

Time Reaper - Mysterious villain seeking to kill Eleanor 

Chris - Modern day character who appears in the final seven of the episode 

Filming will take place in various locations around South London/Surrey such as Cheam, Morden, Sutton and Wimbledon. Exact locations are TBC

Exact dates are TBC but will fall during the 6 week school summer holiday 

As this is a fan film project unfortunately I am unable to offer payment as we do not make money from these projects. I can however offer travel money if it is needed.

If you’re interested send me a message or send an email to dc63productions@gmail.com

topComments.text: Just wondering why your Victorian watchmaker needs to be in his mid 20’s, are you allergic to people over 30? I would have thought a watchmaker in his 50’s would be more credible (still excludes me as I am now 60 so I’m not commenting in the hope that I would be considered)

sharedPost.text:
✨ BIG NEWS FROM MAJESTIC ✨
We are so proud to officially introduce…
💜💛 Majestic Arts Collective CIC 💛💜
As many know at Majestic, we believe every child deserves the chance to shine, regardless of their background or financial circumstances.
Our mission is simple:
✨ Making performing arts accessible to all
✨ Creating opportunities for every child
✨ Supporting young people through creativity and confidence
✨ Giving back to our wider community
Did you know that around 35% of our students currently receive scholarships, bursaries, or discounted fees to help them access training with us? Supporting families and nurturing talent has always been at the heart of everything we do.
Now, through the launch of Majestic Arts Collective CIC, we can do even MORE.
As a Community Interest Company, we’ll be actively seeking sponsorships, partnerships, grants, and donations to help us continue opening doors for young people through the arts.
This is more than dance, drama, and singing.
It’s confidence. Belonging. Opportunity. Family. 💜
If you’d like to support, collaborate, sponsor, or simply learn more, we’d LOVE to hear from you.
Together, we can make performing arts accessible to all. 💜💛

#MajesticArtsCollective #PerformingArtsForAll #CommunityThroughArts #SupportYoungPeople #ArtsForAll

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 18, 2026 (4 hours)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $250

**ROLES:**

• **Business Owner** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Marketing Director** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.text:
Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: 1 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age late 20's, 30's or 40's.

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances (and her notes) that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera. 

Location: TBD - either White Rock or New West 

Date: TBD - sometime before the end of May. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

SHARED ROOM AVAILABLE NOW 🚨 – MELBOURNE CBD (Lonsdale St)

Hi everyone!

We’re leaving our apartment and looking for 2 people to take over our room, available now 😊

📍 Located in the CBD
• Tram 96 right outside (direct to St Kilda 🌊)
• Coles 2 min walk
• Cafés & shops nearby

The room:
• Double bed to share (couple / friends)
• Large wardrobe + bed linen included

The apartment:
• 2 bedrooms
• WiFi included
• Bathroom + washing machine
• Fully equipped kitchen
• Balcony with CBD view
• Chill French roommates

Building:
• Indoor pool • Gym
• Bike storage • Parking
• BBQ area

💰 $580 per person / 2 weeks (bills included)
💵 Bond: $750 per person

Available now – inspections possible

DM if interested! 😊

items.text:
!!! GLINIARZE !!! WARSZAWA !!! POSZUKIWANY BLONDYN !!!

Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję BLONDYNA do roli:

Hubert Jaskólski (18) – Kolega podejrzanego o gwałt. Wie, że niesłusznie posądził kolegę i to przez niego tamten został brutalnie pobity, ale teraz nie chce się przyznać na policji. KONIECZNIE BLONDYN

Data: 28. maja

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

items.text:
Seeking actor for the role of BOB in the short film All American Dinner.
BOB
White male, mid-50s to early 70s. 
A longtime husband who has grown distant and emotionally inattentive in his marriage. Set in his ways, distracted, and unaware of the emotional disconnect around him. Dry realism and subtle emotional depth are important for the role.

Filming: September
Location: Los Angeles
Compensation: Paid, credit, meals 

Non union 

To submit, please send:
• Headshot
• Resume/Reel (if available)
• Contact Information

Email: allamericandinner@gmail.com.    
Subject Line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner
